stem: The lengths of two sides of a triangle are 5 centimeters and 9 centimeters. If the perimeter of the triangle is 21 centimeters, what is the length, in centimeters, of the third side of this triangle?
rationale: Choice D is correct. The perimeter equals the sum of the three sides. Let x be the third side; then 5 + 9 + x = 21, so x = 7 centimeters.
